name: Slider (Multi-Thumb)
description: An extension of the slider with two or more thumbs on a single rail, where each thumb controls one value such as a price range.

keyboard_interactions.action: Increases focused thumb's value by one step
Increases focused thumb's value by one step
Decreases focused thumb's value by one step
Decreases focused thumb's value by one step
Sets focused thumb to its minimum
Sets focused thumb to its maximum
Moves focus between thumbs; tab order stays constant regardless of value

required_attributes.description: Minimum; updated dynamically when dependent on another thumb
Maximum; updated dynamically when dependent on another thumb
Unique accessible name for each thumb

optional_attributes.description: vertical if vertical; default is horizontal

notes: Each thumb must have a distinct accessible name (e.g., 'Minimum price', 'Maximum price')
When thumbs cannot pass each other, dynamically update aria-valuemin/max as constraints change
Tab order between thumbs must remain constant regardless of visual position
